name: Internal Comms & Announcement Drafter
description: Drafts professional internal communications including all-hands announcements, policy updates, change notifications, and team newsletters for Teams, email, and SharePoint. Ask me to draft an announcement, write a policy update, or create a team newsletter.
instructions: See instructions.md for the full system prompt.

conversation_starters.text: Draft a Teams announcement for all staff about office closure on March 20th
Write a formal policy update email about changes to our expense policy
Create a SharePoint News article celebrating our Q1 sales target
Draft a change notification about next week's system maintenance window
